prompt: We have an upcoming audit. Create tests for URS-105 to prove we didn't miss anything and also I need a full report showing how URS-105 maps down to the functional specs.

expected.generateTraceabilityMatrix: generate a Requirement Traceability Matrix (RTM) report specifically for URS-105 to show lineage to functional specs.
expected.generateTestCases: generate tests for URS-105 to prove to prove we didn't miss anything.
